---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of what you want and why.

**Proposed solution**
How you think this should work.

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] AI Engine (phantm/engine/)
- [ ] Backend API (phantm/backend/)
- [ ] Frontend (phantm/frontend/)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / Deployment

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Links, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.
